articles.author: Jordan King
articles.title: The Atlantic’s ‘Cold Blob’ Could Change Weather Across America - Newsweek
articles.description: A new study suggests the Atlantic's mysterious “cold blob“ may signal ocean current changes that could affect U.S. weather.
articles.content: The mysterious North Atlantic "cold blob"an unusually cool patch of ocean south of Greenlandmay be more than a climate oddity. New research suggests it could be a sign that a major Atlantic current s… [+3098 chars]
